title: crambe scabra
intro: Crambe scabra, also known as rough-seed sea rocket, is a perennial plant that belongs to the Brassicaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it a potential remedy for various health issues. The health benefits of Crambe scabra are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of Crambe scabra typically involve infusions or decoctions of the leaves and roots, which can be consumed as teas or used in topical applications.
